regime_fall.current_status: Iran faces an acute crisis as the April 22 ceasefire expiration deadline approaches with diplomatic talks stalled; the regime simultaneously confronts military brinkmanship (tanker blockade-running, vessel seizures, judiciary calls for force readiness), economic freefall ($500M daily losses), and 100+ days of sustained internal unrest, while Pakistan mediates and China signals concern over US blockade actions.
regime_fall.last_major_event: Iran's UN ambassador signaled willingness to resume talks in Islamabad conditional on US blockade lifting on April 22, 2026, as the ceasefire expiration deadline approached with negotiations stalled and military tensions escalating.
